'''Lysire Donabelle''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] at [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. While repairing the ExGal-4 building in the midst of noxious [[dweebit]] fumes, she was killed dishonorably by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yomin Carr]].<ref name="VP" />
